info.title: Rooiam API
info.description: Self-hosted passwordless IAM for multi-tenant SaaS.

200.description: JSON Web Key Set for verifying issued ID tokens
OIDC discovery document (issuer, endpoints, supported algs)
Magic-link email queued (response does not reveal whether the email exists)
Token accepted; sets the session cookie and returns the signed-in user / next step (e.g. MFA)

get.summary: Retrieve the active user's current identity profile

401.description: No valid session cookie

patch.summary: Update the active user's identity profile

401.description: No valid session cookie

302.description: Redirect: to login if no session, else back to the client's redirect_uri with an authorization code (or an error)

200.description: Token response: access_token, id_token, optional refresh_token

oidc_access_token.description: OIDC access token from /oidc/token, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

session_cookie.name: rooiam_session
session_cookie.description: Opaque session cookie set on magic-link verify; sent automatically by the browser.

workspace_api_key.description: Workspace API key, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.
